objects.name: ObjectType
objects.currency: v0.2.1 present
objects.sh02Result: Delete LOGIC+ACTION → ObjectType still describes an entity that exists → DATA

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per business domain (CustomerOrder, TeachingBeat, OntologyPrimitive)
designPrinciples.DRY: Inherits PropertyType + SharedPropertyType to avoid property definition duplication
designPrinciples.OCP: Versioned via branded RID so extension never breaks existing consumers
designPrinciples.PECS: N/A — ObjectType is the base entity, not a generic container

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/primitives/object-type.ts → home /ontology/ObjectType re-export → project ontology/*.ts declarations → src/contracts/*.ts → src/runtime/object-store.ts
objects.backwardPropPath: runtime object creation → emit_event(object_created) → events.jsonl → replay_lineage → schema drift detection → codegen regeneration

objects.name: Struct
objects.justification: DC5-06 first-class primitive for nested composite fields (address, coordinate, measurement). Currently only interface StructType in types.ts — no primitives/struct.ts with registry + codegen contract.
objects.sh02Result: Delete LOGIC+ACTION → a coordinate or address struct still describes reality → DATA

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per value-object vocabulary (Coordinate, Address, Duration)
designPrinciples.DRY: Struct prevents duplication of nested field sets across ObjectTypes
designPrinciples.OCP: New Structs added without modifying existing ObjectTypes

objects.forwardPropPath: ontology/struct.ts → schemas/ontology/primitives/struct.ts → codegen StructDeclaration → project src/generated/structs/*.ts → runtime value-object constructors
objects.backwardPropPath: runtime struct validation → emit_event(struct_validation_failed) → eval drift → primitives/struct.ts refinement

objects.name: ValueType
objects.justification: DC5-06 primitive for reusable scalar constraints (Currency, ISO-Date, Email, URL). Currently only interface ValueType in types.ts — no primitives/value-type.ts with branded constructor + codegen contract.
objects.sh02Result: Delete LOGIC+ACTION → 'USD-currency', 'ISO-8601-date' still describe real-world constraints → DATA

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per domain constraint vocabulary
designPrinciples.DRY: Eliminates repeated validation logic across PropertyType declarations
designPrinciples.OCP: New ValueTypes added additively

objects.forwardPropPath: ontology/value-type.ts → schemas/ontology/primitives/value-type.ts → codegen ValueType branded types → project src/generated/value-types/*.ts → runtime validators
objects.backwardPropPath: runtime validation failure → emit_event(value_type_validation_failed) → eval drift → value-type.ts refinement

objects.name: SharedPropertyType
objects.justification: Cross-object property reuse (createdAt, updatedAt, ownerId used across 3+ ObjectTypes). Currently defined in types.ts but not in codegen pipeline.
objects.sh02Result: Delete LOGIC+ACTION → shared properties (timestamps, owner) still describe facts about entities → DATA

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per cross-cutting concept (AuditFields, OwnedEntity)
designPrinciples.DRY: Directly enforces DRY across ObjectType declarations
designPrinciples.OCP: Added without modifying ObjectType definitions

objects.forwardPropPath: ontology/shared-property.ts → schemas/ontology/primitives/shared-property.ts → codegen re-exports → project src/generated/shared-properties/*.ts
objects.backwardPropPath: runtime shared-property usage audit → emit_event(shared_property_referenced) → drift signal when adoption < 2 ObjectTypes

objects.name: PropertyType
objects.currency: v0.2.1 — 24 branded names (19 base + 5 extended)
objects.sh02Result: Delete LOGIC+ACTION → string/number/date types still describe attribute facts → DATA

designPrinciples.DDD: Branded names per domain vocabulary
designPrinciples.DRY: Base 19 + extended 5 prevents redefinition
designPrinciples.OCP: Extended without changing base

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/primitives/property-type.ts → project ontology declarations → codegen property unions → runtime validators
objects.backwardPropPath: runtime type mismatch → emit_event(property_type_violation) → eval → schema refinement

objects.name: LinkType
objects.currency: v0.2.1 — LinkCardinality 4 (1:1 / M:1 / 1:M / M:N). Object-Backed flavor exists via discriminated union.
objects.sh01Result: LinkType describes how to REASON about relationships (traversal, propagation), not a stored fact → LOGIC

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per relationship verb (ownedBy, teaches, relatedTo)
designPrinciples.DRY: Cardinality enum reused across link declarations
designPrinciples.OCP: New link flavors added via discriminated union

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/primitives/link-type.ts → project ontology/logic.ts → codegen link traversal helpers → runtime query engine
objects.backwardPropPath: runtime traversal failure → emit_event(link_traversal_failed) → eval → link-type.ts refinement

objects.name: InterfaceType
objects.currency: v0.2.1 present — missing BrandedRID (only string APIName today)
objects.sh01Result: Interface defines a shared contract for polymorphic reasoning, not a stored fact → LOGIC

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per domain capability (Searchable, Auditable, Owned)
designPrinciples.DRY: Interface reuse across ObjectTypes eliminates duplicate contract declarations
designPrinciples.OCP: Core principle — ObjectTypes implement interfaces, extended without modification
designPrinciples.PECS: Consumer-super applies when interface is used as a parameter type

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/primitives/interface-type.ts → project ontology/logic.ts → codegen interface contracts → runtime polymorphic dispatch
objects.backwardPropPath: runtime interface contract violation → emit_event(interface_contract_violation) → eval → interface.ts refinement

objects.name: DerivedProperty
objects.currency: v0.2.1 — onRead | cached modes; Beta per 2026-Q1
objects.sh01Result: DerivedProperty COMPUTES over raw data; it does not describe a stored fact → LOGIC

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per computed concept (totalPrice, fullName, isOverdue)
designPrinciples.DRY: Prevents re-implementing the same computation across callers
designPrinciples.OCP: Added without modifying source properties

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/functions/derived-property.ts → project ontology/logic.ts → codegen derived getters → runtime memoization
objects.backwardPropPath: runtime derived-property staleness → emit_event(derived_property_recomputed) → cache drift detection → refinement

objects.name: Reducer
objects.currency: v0.2.1 — PropertyReducerStrategy 6 variants
objects.sh01Result: Reducer aggregates collections to derive new facts → LOGIC

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per aggregation (orderTotalByCustomer, attendanceByBeat)
designPrinciples.DRY: Common aggregation strategies (6 variants) reused
designPrinciples.OCP: Strategy-union extended additively
designPrinciples.PECS: CRITICAL — Reducer<In,Out> MUST use Producer-Extends input variance and Consumer-Super output variance

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/functions/reducer.ts → project ontology/logic.ts → codegen reducer pipelines → runtime streaming fold
objects.backwardPropPath: runtime reducer divergence → emit_event(reducer_output_drift) → eval → strategy refinement

objects.name: EditFunction
objects.currency: v0.2.1 — returns Edits[] without commit; mcp__palantir-mini__apply_edit_function
objects.sh03Result: Returns Edits[] (proposed changes, no side effects) → LOGIC (it computes, does not commit)

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per business transformation (validateOrder, calculateDiscount)
designPrinciples.DRY: Reusable computation separated from commit
designPrinciples.OCP: Chain composed without modifying underlying functions
designPrinciples.PECS: Producer-extends on input, Consumer-super on Edits[] output

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/functions/function-signature.ts → project ontology/logic.ts → codegen EditFunction signatures → runtime apply_edit_function (MCP)
objects.backwardPropPath: emit_event(edit_function_applied) → events.jsonl → replay for dry-run audit → function refinement

objects.name: AIPLogicFunction
objects.justification: LLM-backed function primitive; distinguishes from deterministic EditFunction. Workflow Lineage §DL-04 lists 'AIP Logic Functions' as separate graph node type. Not represented in schemas/ontology/functions/ today.
objects.sh03Result: LLM computation returns proposed Edits[] OR proposed reasoning without commit → LOGIC (non-deterministic variant)

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per semantic task (classifyIntent, summarizeCase, suggestNextAction)
designPrinciples.DRY: LLM prompt templates reusable across callers
designPrinciples.OCP: Model-agnostic (K-LLM consensus per §PHIL.R-02) — swap backends without changing callers

objects.forwardPropPath: ontology/aip-logic-function.ts → schemas/ontology/functions/aip-logic-function.ts → codegen K-LLM signature → runtime dispatcher
objects.backwardPropPath: emit_event(aip_function_invoked, model, confidence) → evaluator K-LLM coherence check (§VAL.R-20) → refinement

objects.name: ActionType
objects.currency: v0.2.1 — Tier1Declarative | Tier2FunctionBacked
objects.sh03Result: ActionType COMMITS edits (side effects, reality change) → ACTION

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per business command (submitOrder, publishBeat, registerPrimitive)
designPrinciples.DRY: Two tiers prevent reinventing simple mutations for every action
designPrinciples.OCP: Tier union extended; Tier1 and Tier2 mutually exclusive per §ACTION.R-02

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/primitives/action-type.ts → project ontology/action.ts → codegen action signatures → runtime commit_edits (MCP)
objects.backwardPropPath: emit_event(action_committed) → action log (§ACTION.R-11 queryable ontology object) → lineage → refinement

objects.name: AutomationDeclaration
objects.justification: Research/action/automation.md covers cron/trigger/scheduled automation but no primitive in primitives/automation.ts. Needed to represent scheduled or triggered action invocation as a first-class ontology entity.
objects.sh03Result: Describes HOW reality changes via trigger/schedule → ACTION

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per automation semantic (nightlyRollup, onOrderSubmitted)
designPrinciples.DRY: Shared cron/trigger vocabulary
designPrinciples.OCP: New trigger kinds added additively

objects.forwardPropPath: ontology/automation.ts → schemas/ontology/primitives/automation.ts → codegen trigger registrations → runtime scheduler
objects.backwardPropPath: emit_event(automation_triggered, scheduleId) → lineage → drift when failure rate exceeds threshold → refinement

objects.name: WebhookDeclaration
objects.justification: Research/action/webhooks.md documents external event ingress. Needed as first-class primitive so ingress is governed + audited.
objects.sh03Result: External ingress converts webhook payload → Edits → commit → ACTION

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per source (stripeWebhook, slackEvent)
designPrinciples.DRY: Common auth + retry patterns shared
designPrinciples.OCP: New providers added without changing dispatch core

objects.forwardPropPath: ontology/webhook.ts → schemas/ontology/primitives/webhook.ts → codegen route handlers → runtime webhook server
objects.backwardPropPath: emit_event(webhook_received, webhook_rejected) → retry audit → refinement

objects.name: SubmissionCriteria
objects.currency: v0.2.1 — 9 constraint classes; pre-flight enforced by commit_edits
objects.sh03Result: Pre-commit guard before reality change → ACTION (constraint applied at commit boundary)

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per constraint class (UniqueConstraint, RangeConstraint)
designPrinciples.DRY: 9 canonical classes prevent ad-hoc check duplication
designPrinciples.OCP: New constraint classes added additively

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/policies/submission-criteria.ts → project ontology/action.ts → codegen pre-flight checks → runtime commit_edits dry-run (validateOnly)
objects.backwardPropPath: emit_event(submission_criteria_failed) → reject audit → constraint refinement

objects.name: RBACFragment
objects.currency: v0.2.1 — Layer-1 role-only (managed-settings.d fragment); Layer-2/3 deferred

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per role bucket (schemas-read, generated-write, mcp-tool-allow)
designPrinciples.DRY: Fragment-based composition prevents duplicated permission rules across projects
designPrinciples.OCP: Per-project fragments additive; shared fragment re-used

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/policies/rbac.ts → plugin managed-settings.d/50-palantir-mini.json → per-project managed-settings.d/ → runtime permission check
objects.backwardPropPath: emit_event(permission_denied) → RBAC audit → fragment refinement

objects.name: CapabilityToken
objects.justification: 4-layer security model (§SEC.R-01) requires cell-level + capability-based governance. Layer-1 RBAC alone is insufficient for sensitive actions. Needed for §SOS-01 approval workflows.
objects.sh04Result: Governs UNDER WHAT CONDITIONS an action is permitted → SECURITY

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per sensitive operation (ship-merge, schema-write, ontology-register)
designPrinciples.DRY: Token issuance logic centralized
designPrinciples.OCP: New token kinds additive; existing tokens immutable

objects.forwardPropPath: ontology/capability-token.ts → schemas/ontology/policies/capability-token.ts → plugin managed-settings.d Layer-2 → runtime commit_edits token check
objects.backwardPropPath: emit_event(capability_token_issued, capability_token_consumed, capability_token_denied) → audit → issuance policy refinement

objects.name: MarkingDeclaration
objects.justification: Marking-based security (§SEC.R-03) is Palantir standard. Without it, cell-level classification and column masking are impossible.
objects.sh04Result: Classifies WHO may see specific data cells under specific markings → SECURITY

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per classification vocabulary (PII, Confidential, StudentData)
designPrinciples.DRY: Marking set reused across properties + objects
designPrinciples.OCP: New markings added without touching existing classifications

objects.forwardPropPath: ontology/marking.ts → schemas/ontology/policies/marking.ts → plugin managed-settings Layer-3 → runtime property-level access check
objects.backwardPropPath: emit_event(marking_check_passed, marking_check_denied) → audit → marking policy refinement

objects.name: EventTypeRegistry

objects.sh05Result: Captures WHAT HAPPENED and WHY per event → LEARN

designPrinciples.DDD: Named per lifecycle moment (object_created, action_committed, evaluation_recorded)
designPrinciples.DRY: Canonical variant list prevents ad-hoc event types
designPrinciples.OCP: New variants additive; old never removed (append-only log discipline)

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/lineage/event-types.ts → palantir-mini lib/event-log/types.ts → emit_event MCP tool → events.jsonl
objects.backwardPropPath: events.jsonl → snapshot → replay_lineage → variant coverage audit → registry expansion

objects.currency: v0.2.1 — WHEN / ATOP_WHICH / THROUGH_WHICH / BY_WHOM / WITH_WHAT
objects.sh05Result: 5-dimensional audit record of every decision → LEARN

designPrinciples.DDD: Each dim names a first-class lineage concept
designPrinciples.DRY: Every event carries all 5 dims — no alternate lineage formats
designPrinciples.OCP: New fields additive within withWhat.reasoning; core 5 immutable

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/lineage/decision-lineage.ts → palantir-mini lib/event-log → events.jsonl → replay_lineage MCP tool
objects.backwardPropPath: replay_lineage(byWhom, throughWhich, atopWhich filter) → pattern detection → refinement

objects.name: ScenarioSandbox

designPrinciples.DRY: Shared lineage replay for scenario + production
designPrinciples.OCP: New scenarios added without touching production lineage

objects.backwardPropPath: emit_event(scenario_created, scenario_evaluated, scenario_promoted) → evaluator scenario R-gate → refinement

objects.name: HomeSharedOntology
objects.justification: Home repo (~/) has NO ontology/ directory today. palantir-math + mathcrew each declare ontology independently, causing uncoordinated duplication. Adding shared ~/ontology/ layer is the critical ForwardProp repair for v1.0.
objects.sh02Result: Shared primitives describe what exists across all projects → DATA (scoped module)

designPrinciples.DDD: Bounded context boundary between shared core and project-specific
designPrinciples.DRY: Single definition of shared primitives — THE primary DRY win for v1.0
designPrinciples.OCP: Home ontology closed to modification; projects extend it

objects.backwardPropPath: project ontology divergence events → home ontology re-alignment → schemas refinement

designPrinciples.DRY: Extending home ontology (in v1.0) removes current cross-project duplication with mathcrew
designPrinciples.OCP: Project additively extends shared core

objects.name: PalantirMiniPlugin
objects.currency: v0.2.x — 5 MCP tools, 6 hooks (of 27 available), 4 validation phases (of 6), Layer-1 RBAC
objects.sh03Result: Plugin's runtime effect CHANGES reality (commits, regenerates codegen, enforces hooks) → ACTION substrate

designPrinciples.DDD: Foundry-analog operational layer; bridge/lib/hooks/skills boundaries preserve domain roles
designPrinciples.DRY: Single plugin installed across 3 projects (eliminates per-project operational layer duplication)
designPrinciples.OCP: v1.0 extends v0.2 — new MCP tools + hooks added additively; no breaking MCP signature changes
designPrinciples.PECS: Subagents as consumers of plugin capabilities — consumer-super on tool signatures

objects.forwardPropPath: schemas/ontology/ → plugin-bundled mcp-server.ts → per-session events.jsonl + codegen outputs → project runtime
objects.backwardPropPath: runtime events → events.jsonl → snapshots → replay_lineage → plugin capability refinement

objects.name: ClaudeSchemasPackage
objects.currency: @palantirKC/claude-schemas@0.2.1 git-tag; axes ontology 1.12.0 / interaction 0.1.2 / meta 0.1.0 / rendering 0.1.0
objects.sh02Result: Schema primitive definitions describe what exists → DATA (cross-project canonical source)
objects.v1Plan: v1.0 major-bump git-tag; axes consolidated or per-axis version gated; peerDep pin bumped atomically across 3 consumers

designPrinciples.DDD: Axis boundaries map to domain roles (ontology vs interaction vs rendering)
designPrinciples.DRY: Maven-analog prevents per-project schema reimplementation
designPrinciples.OCP: SemVer protects consumers; v1.0 breaking-change allowed by user directive
designPrinciples.PECS: Reducer<In,Out> contract applies PECS within ontology axis

objects.backwardPropPath: project-side drift signals → schemas CHANGELOG entry → SemVer bump → coordinated consumer migration

objects.name: ShipSkill
objects.currency: user-scope /ship 465 LOC — does NOT consume events.jsonl; rewrites required for v1.0
objects.sh03Result: Commits PR, pushes, merges — reality change → ACTION

designPrinciples.DDD: Ship = semantic intent 'close out work'; AIPCon 9 Ship OS patterns (§SOS-01..05) apply
designPrinciples.DRY: Shared across 3 projects once plugin is substrate
designPrinciples.OCP: New validation gates added via plugin; skill remains thin dispatcher

objects.forwardPropPath: events.jsonl → /ship skill (v1.0) → PR body + pm-verify → git push → merge → emit session_complete
objects.backwardPropPath: ship failures → emit_event(ship_rejected) → evaluator → skill refinement

objects.name: OrchestrateSkill
objects.currency: user-scope /orchestrate 406 LOC — plugin is afterthought, not substrate
objects.sh03Result: Each phase transition writes state → ACTION
objects.v1Plan: Rewrite: every phase transition via plugin MCP calls (emit_event, get_ontology, apply_edit_function, commit_edits); plugin becomes substrate

designPrinciples.DDD: Orchestration domain distinct from individual domain work
designPrinciples.DRY: Single orchestrator across 3 projects via plugin
designPrinciples.OCP: New phase kinds added via plugin event types; skill stays thin

objects.forwardPropPath: user intent → /orchestrate skill (v1.0) → plugin MCP calls per phase → events.jsonl → validated state
objects.backwardPropPath: phase gate failures → emit_event(phase_rejected) → evaluator → orchestrator refinement

objects.name: PalantirDispatchSkill
objects.justification: AIP-analog semantic intent dispatcher. Accepts user intent, classifies, routes to correct skill. Mirrors Palantir AIP pattern per RQ-03.

designPrinciples.DDD: Intent → skill routing; distinct from direct skill invocation
designPrinciples.DRY: Single dispatch point vs per-user memorization of slash-commands
designPrinciples.OCP: New intents added via plugin intent registry

objects.forwardPropPath: user prompt → /palantir-dispatch → intent classifier → routed skill → emit_event(dispatch_routed, skill, intent)
objects.backwardPropPath: dispatch miss-routes → emit_event(dispatch_misrouted) → intent registry refinement

objects.name: OntologyRegisterSkill
objects.justification: /ontology-register handles primitive registration + codegen trigger; needed to make ontology declaration first-class vs ad-hoc file edits.
objects.sh03Result: Registration → schema write → codegen regeneration → ACTION

designPrinciples.DDD: Registration as semantic intent distinct from raw file write
designPrinciples.DRY: Uniform registration pipeline for all primitive kinds
designPrinciples.OCP: New primitive kinds added via registry extension

objects.forwardPropPath: user → /ontology-register → validate → write schemas + re-codegen → emit_event(ontology_registered, primitive, schemaVersion)
objects.backwardPropPath: registration rejections → emit_event(ontology_register_rejected) → validation refinement

objects.name: ForwardPropPipeline
objects.currency: Broken: home repo missing ontology/ layer; palantir-math + mathcrew declare independently
objects.sh01Result: Describes HOW to propagate (reason about change) from research → runtime → LOGIC
objects.healthStatusRationale: No shared home ontology/. Two projects duplicate primitives.

designPrinciples.DDD: Each layer named by role (research, schemas, home, project, contracts, runtime)
designPrinciples.DRY: v1.0 home ontology/ adds DRY enforcement layer
designPrinciples.OCP: Lower layers closed; higher layers extend — strictly enforced once home layer exists
designPrinciples.PECS: Layer boundaries with producer-extends on types flowing down

objects.forwardPropPath: [research/, schemas/, ~/ontology/ (NEW v1.0), <project>/ontology/, <project>/src/contracts/, <project>/src/runtime, artifacts/]
objects.backwardPropPath: [runtime events, lineage snapshots, evaluations, refinement signals, ontology updates]

objects.name: BackwardPropPipeline
objects.currency: Partial: events.jsonl + snapshots + replay_lineage working; evaluator → schema update manual
objects.sh05Result: Records outcomes and routes learning back to ontology → LEARN
objects.healthStatusRationale: Forward mechanisms (events, snapshots, replay) operational. Backward automation (evaluator signals → schema refinement) is manual Phase-B planning today.

designPrinciples.DDD: Each step named by lineage role (runtime event → lineage → evaluation → refinement)
designPrinciples.DRY: Single events.jsonl powers all backward paths
designPrinciples.OCP: New evaluator gates (R16+) added without breaking existing R1-R15
designPrinciples.PECS: Evaluator output types covariant across gate versions

objects.forwardPropPath: [runtime event → emit_event → events.jsonl → snapshot → replay_lineage]
objects.backwardPropPath: [evaluator R-gate → drift_detected event → pm-codegen suggestion → /ontology-register → schemas refinement]

ontology.currentState: schemas v0.2.1 — 4 axes (ontology 1.12.0 / interaction 0.1.2 / meta 0.1.0 / rendering 0.1.0). Missing Struct + ValueType + SharedPropertyType primitives. No home-repo ontology/ directory. palantir-math + mathcrew declare independently with known duplication.
ontology.v1Target: schemas v1.0 canonical source with Struct + ValueType + CapabilityToken + MarkingDeclaration + AutomationDeclaration + WebhookDeclaration + ScenarioSandbox + AIPLogicFunction + SharedPropertyType primitives. NEW ~/ontology/ shared layer re-exports and extends. Per-project ontology/ extends shared core with documented divergence justifications.
ontology.gap: 9 missing primitives + home /ontology/ layer absent + legacy types.ts/semantics.ts superseded by primitives/ layer but not retired
ontology.dc5PrincipleApplied: DDD: bounded contexts (shared core / home / per-project). DRY: home ontology eliminates palantir-math × mathcrew duplication. OCP: per-axis version gates + versioned extension. PECS: Reducer<In,Out> and Edits[] contract apply in-out variance.

aip.currentState: /ship (465 LOC user-scope) + /orchestrate (406 LOC user-scope) exist but do NOT use palantir-mini as substrate. /ship does not consume events.jsonl. /orchestrate treats plugin as afterthought. No semantic-intent dispatcher.
aip.v1Target: Skills dispatch semantic intent: /palantir-dispatch (intent classifier → skill router), /ontology-register (primitive registration + codegen emission), /ship (lineage-driven PR body from events.jsonl + 6-phase pm-verify), /orchestrate (every phase transition via plugin MCP calls). Each skill emits events per event contract.
aip.gap: /palantir-dispatch missing entirely; /ontology-register missing entirely; /ship + /orchestrate need rewrite to read events.jsonl and run plugin as substrate; event contract per skill missing
aip.dc5PrincipleApplied: DDD: each skill maps to a single AIP-analog intent. DRY: dispatcher centralizes intent→skill routing. OCP: new intents added via plugin intent registry without changing dispatcher core. PECS: intent types covariant; skill inputs contravariant.

foundry.currentState: palantir-mini v0.2 — 5 MCP tools (get_ontology, emit_event, apply_edit_function, commit_edits, replay_lineage), 6/27 hooks (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PreCompact, TaskCompleted, Stop, SessionStart), 4/6 validation phases (design, compile, runtime, post-write; Deploy + Merge deferred), Layer-1 RBAC only. package.json declares 0.1.0 but CLAUDE.md references 0.2.0 — version reconciliation needed.
foundry.v1Target: palantir-mini v1.0 — 10+ MCP tools (add ontology_schema_get, project_register, codegen_trigger, scenario_create, capability_token_check), 15+ hooks (add TaskCreated, TeammateIdle, SubagentStop, PostCompact, ShutdownRequest, TeamCreated/Deleted, TeammateJoin/Leave/Error, AgentStart/Stop/Error/Message, PlanApproval, MemoryWrite/Read, ToolApproval/Denied, CompactStart, UserPromptSubmit), 6/6 validation phases (add Deploy + Merge, fail-fast mode), Layer-1/2/3 RBAC (RBAC + CapabilityToken + Marking), deterministic codegen with SSoT header contract.
foundry.gap: 5 MCP tools missing; 21 hook events uncovered; 2 validation phases deferred; Layer-2/3 RBAC missing; CapabilityToken primitive missing; codegen not auto-invoked on schema change; monitors/ not wired to hooks; version string mismatch; BrandedRID missing for LinkType + InterfaceType
foundry.dc5PrincipleApplied: DDD: Foundry operational substrate boundary (bridge/lib/hooks/skills) preserves roles. DRY: single plugin across 3 projects. OCP: v1.0 extends v0.2 additively via new MCP tools + hooks; no signature breaks. PECS: MCP tool IO respects producer-extends input / consumer-super output.

maven.currentState: @palantirKC/claude-schemas@0.2.1 git-tag (git+https://github.com/park-kyungchan/claude-schemas.git#v0.2.1) pinned in all 3 consumers via peerDependencies. rules/08-schema-versioning.md enforces semver gates. CHANGELOG.md documents v0.2.0 and v0.2.1 additions.
maven.v1Target: @palantirKC/claude-schemas@1.0.0 SemVer-breaking git-tag (per-axis version gates). Atomic 3-consumer migration coordinated via Wave pattern (staging PR sequence). CHANGELOG.md v1.0 entry enumerating all breaking changes + additive primitives + deprecation notes. pm-verify blocks when peerDep pin incompatible.
maven.gap: v1.0 tag not cut; per-axis version gate policy not documented; 3-consumer atomic migration sequence not planned; breaking-change manifest missing
maven.dc5PrincipleApplied: DDD: each axis is a bounded context with its own version. DRY: Maven-analog prevents per-project schema reimplementation. OCP: additive primitives additive even in v1.0; true breaks limited to legacy retirement. PECS: generic type boundaries preserved across version transitions.

authorityChain.authority: shared core primitives for 3 projects — DRY boundary

forwardProp.enforcementMechanism: pm-verify 4→6 phase gates enforce each layer transition; higher layer wins on conflict per rules/01-ontology-first-core.md; managed-settings.d deny rules enforce schema lock; v1.0 adds Layer-2 CapabilityToken for sensitive cross-layer writes
forwardProp.healthStatusRationale: Home repo (~/) has NO ontology/ layer, breaking the authority chain. palantir-math + mathcrew extend nothing — they define independently, causing duplication (both declare ConceptPrimitive, both define frontend patterns independently). v1.0 adds ~/ontology/ to restore the chain and unify cross-project primitives.

backwardProp.mechanism: Append-only events.jsonl via mcp__palantir-mini__emit_event → PreCompact snapshots → replay_lineage for 5-dim filter → evaluator R-gate signals → (v1.0) automatic ontology refinement suggestions via pm-codegen + /ontology-register
backwardProp.currentReach: Forward side complete: events emit, snapshots roll, replay works. Feedback side manual: evaluator signals do not yet auto-generate ontology refinement proposals — Phase B automation target.
backwardProp.healthStatusRationale: events + snapshots + replay working via palantir-mini v0.2. But evaluator → schema update is manual Phase B planning. v1.0 target: drift_detected + evaluation_recorded events auto-trigger pm-codegen suggestions; evaluator R-gate signals emit ontology-refinement events consumable by /ontology-register.

v1PrimitiveSelection.name: Struct
v1PrimitiveSelection.rationale: DC5-06 first-class primitive for nested composite fields. Currently only interface StructType in types.ts — no primitives/struct.ts with registry.
v1PrimitiveSelection.migrationNote: Additive. Existing StructType interface aliased to new primitive during transition.

v1PrimitiveSelection.name: ValueType
v1PrimitiveSelection.rationale: DC5-06 first-class primitive for reusable scalar constraints (Currency, ISO-Date, Email). Currently only interface ValueType in types.ts.

v1PrimitiveSelection.name: SharedPropertyType
v1PrimitiveSelection.rationale: Cross-object property reuse; needed in codegen pipeline (currently in types.ts but not codegen-integrated).
v1PrimitiveSelection.migrationNote: Additive. Existing types.ts definition promoted to primitives/ layer.

v1PrimitiveSelection.name: CapabilityToken
v1PrimitiveSelection.rationale: Layer-2 RBAC needed for sensitive actions (ship-merge, schema-write, ontology-register). RBAC alone insufficient per §SEC.R-01.
v1PrimitiveSelection.migrationNote: Additive. Layer-1 RBAC remains; CapabilityToken layered on top.

v1PrimitiveSelection.name: MarkingDeclaration
v1PrimitiveSelection.rationale: Layer-2/3 RBAC overlay per Palantir standard. Enables cell-level classification and column masking.
v1PrimitiveSelection.migrationNote: Additive. Fully opt-in at v1.0 release.

v1PrimitiveSelection.name: AutomationDeclaration
v1PrimitiveSelection.rationale: Describes cron/trigger/scheduled action as first-class primitive. Research covered; primitive missing.

v1PrimitiveSelection.name: WebhookDeclaration
v1PrimitiveSelection.rationale: External event ingress as first-class primitive. Research covered; primitive missing.

v1PrimitiveSelection.name: ScenarioSandbox
v1PrimitiveSelection.rationale: DC5-10 Scenarios for what-if analysis. Isolates scenario runs so they do not pollute production lineage.

v1PrimitiveSelection.name: AIPLogicFunction
v1PrimitiveSelection.rationale: LLM-backed function primitive. Workflow Lineage §DL-04 lists it as separate graph node type. Distinguishes from deterministic EditFunction.

action.rationale: Authoritative through 2026-Q1; referenced in v0.2 lib/actions/; OSDK 2.0 patterns current.

architecture.rationale: ontology-model.md + orchestration-map.md current; adapter-gap-analysis.md [Inference] dated 2026-03-17 references frontend-dashboard/convex paths from prior iteration — may not match current 3-project scope.

cross-cutting.rationale: llm-independence principle + cross-cutting patterns + decision-lineage 5-dim still current through AIPCon 9 (March 2026).

data.rationale: Includes 2026-Q1 features (AIP Doc Intelligence GA Feb 2026, Core Object Views GA Feb 2026, Derived Properties Beta).

decision-lineage.rationale: 5-dim Decision Lineage foundational; Workflow Lineage GA Nov 2025, Cross-Ontology visualization Feb 2026.

entry.rationale: Decomposition + requirements intake patterns cited in T1 decomposition.

logic.rationale: Impact Propagation Graph thesis authoritative; directly encoded in palantir-mini v0.2 lib/codegen and lib/actions.

marketplace.rationale: Only BROWSE.md + INDEX.md present per source-map; content files may be stubs; verify during legacy sweep before declaring deletable.

osdk.rationale: OSDK 2.0 patterns referenced in schemas primitives + codegen. Sub-files noted as potentially stub per INDEX.md.

philosophy.rationale: Digital twin + ontology vision underpin BackwardProp design; AIPCon 9 + Chief Architect quotes current.

platform.rationale: DevCon 5 §DC5-* foundation — most recent event March 11 2026.

security.rationale: RBAC L1 documented; L2/L3 patterns directly inform v1.0 CapabilityToken + MarkingDeclaration additions.

ship-os.rationale: AIPCon 9 Ship OS patterns (§SOS-01..05) — governs v1.0 /ship rewrite.

typescript.rationale: Philosophy-level low depth; 2 files not deeply read per source-map gaps.

validation.rationale: 6-phase validation model authoritative; 2 phases missing in v0.2 plugin explicitly informs v1.0 gap fill.

interaction/*.rationale: Currently v0.1.2; v1.0 will bump consistently; low rebuild risk.

meta/*.rationale: Currently v0.1.0; no per-project use found per source-map. May be deprecated or integrated into ontology axis in v1.0.

ontology/types.ts.rationale: Schema lock per managed-settings.d deny rules. v1.0 new canonical source in primitives/ layer; types.ts sections superseded by primitives/ are candidates for retirement.

ontology/semantics.ts.rationale: Same as types.ts — schema lock; v1.0 candidate for retirement.

ontology/primitives/.rationale: Core v0.2 primitives; v1.0 adds Struct + ValueType + CapabilityToken + Marking + Automation + Webhook + ScenarioSandbox + AIPLogicFunction + SharedPropertyType.

ontology/functions/.rationale: EditFunction + DerivedProperty + Reducer present; v1.0 adds AIPLogicFunction.

ontology/policies/.rationale: SubmissionCriteria + RBACFragment + ForwardProp/BackwardProp present; v1.0 adds CapabilityToken + MarkingDeclaration.

ontology/lineage/.rationale: DecisionLineage + EVENT_TYPE_REGISTRY present; v1.0 expands registry from 10 → 16+ variants.

ontology/generators/.rationale: OSDK-2.0-config + LazyRef present; v1.0 adds codegen header contract + drift detection.

rendering/*.rationale: Currently v0.1.0; mathcrew has theater-kind.ts + beat-template.ts — rendering axis may need extension for theater primitives in v1.0.

bridge/mcp-server.ts.rationale: Expand from 5 to 10+ MCP tools (add ontology_schema_get, project_register, codegen_trigger, scenario_create, capability_token_check). Version reconciliation needed (package.json 0.1.0 vs docs 0.2.0).

lib/actions/.rationale: Tier-1/Tier-2 pattern sound; v1.0 adds CapabilityToken pre-flight + Marking access check.

lib/codegen/.rationale: Add deterministic header contract (schema version + ontology hash + generator version + timestamp). Support home-ontology + project-ontology chain. Auto-invoke on schema edit.

lib/event-log/.rationale: Append-only + 2000 concurrent writer limit proven. Add 6 event type variants.

lib/validation/pipeline.ts.rationale: 4/6 phases; add Deploy + Merge phases; fail-fast mode.

hooks/hooks.json.rationale: 6/27 events; add TaskCreated, TeammateIdle, SubagentStop, PostCompact, ShutdownRequest, TeamCreated/Deleted, TeammateJoin/Leave/Error, AgentStart/Stop/Error/Message, PlanApproval, MemoryWrite/Read, ToolApproval/Denied, CompactStart, UserPromptSubmit.

skills/pm-*.rationale: 7 skills operational (pm-action, pm-blueprint, pm-codegen, pm-init, pm-recap, pm-replay, pm-verify). v1.0 adds pm-ontology-register, pm-dispatch; expand pm-verify for new gates.

agents/*.rationale: 5 agents (action-executor, change-auditor, codegen-runner, ontology-verifier, propagation-tracer) optimized for v0.2; v1.0 may need prompt updates for new primitives. Not deeply read per source-map gaps.

managed-settings.d/50-palantir-mini.json.rationale: Add L2/L3 RBAC rules (CapabilityToken enforcement + Marking checks). Add deny rules for sensitive-action direct writes requiring CapabilityToken.

monitors/.rationale: drift-watch.ts + event-log-tail.ts exist but not wired to hook events. v1.0 wires monitors to TeammateIdle + PostCompact hooks.

scripts/.rationale: log.ts + run.ts current; migrate-palantir-math-schema.ts is transitional — review for retirement post-v1.0 migration.

home.status: NEW in v1.0 (currently does not exist — critical ForwardProp repair)
primitives: Shared core re-exports: ObjectType, LinkType, ValueType (NEW), InterfaceType, Struct (NEW), DerivedProperty, Reducer, ActionType, SubmissionCriteria, CapabilityToken (NEW), MarkingDeclaration (NEW), SharedPropertyType (NEW), AutomationDeclaration (NEW), WebhookDeclaration (NEW), ScenarioSandbox (NEW), AIPLogicFunction (NEW), EventTypeRegistry, DecisionLineage
home.exports: Shared primitive definitions re-exported from ~/.claude/schemas/ but scoped to ~/ as the 'home shared layer' — the control plane that projects extend. Also home-specific primitives (e.g., CrossProjectTeammate, CoordinatedPRWave) not needed by individual projects.

palantir-math.status: EXISTING (14 files); extend from home ontology in v1.0
primitives: Math-specific: ConceptPrimitive (math variant), JSXGraphRenderer, CoordinateSystem, ParametricCurve, FunctionGraph, AxisScale, TeachingState (pending D-cont-2 decision)
divergenceJustifications: ConceptPrimitive taxonomy is math-domain (distinct from mathcrew ConceptPrimitive)
F-1 full: jsxGraphRenderer functiongraph + parametric-curve body extraction requires curveHelpers.ts with 7 module-local symbols

mathcrew.status: EXISTING (16 files — richer than palantir-math; includes learn.ts + frontend-semantic-core.ts)
primitives: Theater-specific: BeatTemplate, EventEnvelope, FrontendSemanticCore, TheaterKind, TeachingFlow, ConceptPrimitive (theater variant), 3D-scene primitives
divergenceJustifications: Theater-canvas-renderer.ts pending deletion (interactive-beat evaluator bridge required)
Runtime wiring: teaching-flow.ts Enter via enterSteps; should prefer beat.beatTemplate

crossCuttingConcerns: Schema lock: ~/.claude/schemas/ontology/types.ts and semantics.ts stay read-only per managed-settings.d deny rules during Phase A. v1.0 creates new canonical source in primitives/ layer and retires legacy types.ts/semantics.ts sections superseded by primitives.
Version reconciliation: palantir-mini plugin package.json shows 0.1.0 but docs + CLAUDE.md reference 0.2.0. Reconcile to true 0.2.x before v1.0 bump so version lineage is unambiguous.

Atomic 3-consumer migration: All three projects (~, palantir-math, mathcrew) must bump peerDep pin to @palantirKC/claude-schemas@1.0.0 simultaneously. Wave pattern required (home → math → crew or parallel coordinated PRs).

DC5 principle enforcement: DDD (bounded contexts — schemas axes, home/project ontology, plugin subsystems). DRY (shared core in ~/ontology/ is THE v1.0 win). OCP (versioned extension via per-axis version gates + CapabilityToken additive layer). PECS (in-out variance in Reducer<In,Out> + Edits[] producer/consumer contract).
Browse protocol: No broad scanning. All retrieval goes through BROWSE.md recipes. Marketplace/ only has BROWSE.md + INDEX.md today — content files may be stubs; flagged for review in legacy audit.
Event emission discipline: Every ontology-state file edit MUST emit ontology_edit event BEFORE write (enforced by hooks + plugin). v1.0 expands EVENT_TYPE_REGISTRY from 10 → 16+ variants.

ForwardProp repair: ~/ontology/ directory addition is THE critical repair. Without it, palantir-math + mathcrew have unmanaged duplication (both declare ConceptPrimitive, both define frontend patterns independently). This is the highest-leverage structural change in v1.0.

BackwardProp automation: Evaluator R1-R15 gate signals currently manual. v1.0 target: drift_detected + evaluation_recorded auto-trigger pm-codegen suggestions; evaluator signals emit ontology-refinement events consumable by /ontology-register skill. Reduces manual loop to automated.

Per-project ontology/ divergence: Documented + justified at primitive-level. palantir-math diverges on JSXGraph/math-concept. mathcrew diverges on theater/beat-template. Home ontology captures the intersection; divergences are leaf extensions.

Adapter-gap-analysis.md staleness: [Inference] dated 2026-03-17 references frontend-dashboard/convex paths from prior iteration — may not match current 3-project scope (palantirkc home / palantir-math / mathcrew). Useful for gap patterns, not for current code paths. Update or annotate as historical.
